description:
Streamline your systems management

Scan, collect, and organize your on-prem Windows machines so deployments go exactly where you need them to with PDQ Inventory.
Changes/Improvements
- Updated dependencies
- Added support for Secure Email Authentication via Oauth2 (Microsoft and Google) and Microsoft Graph API
- Upgrade SQLite to 3.49.2 to address flagging of CVE-2025-29087
Bug Fixes
- Inventory: Move Windows Server 2025 collection to Servers parent collection
